schedules.completion_notes: Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Operation Room. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). Battery alarm, power failure test, battery voltage satisfactory. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory (model-specific range).

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Emergency Room. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). O2 purity satisfactory. Battery alarm & power failure alarm unsatisfactory. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Emergency. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). O2 purity & battery voltage satisfactory. Battery alarm, power failure alarm, cycle pressure unsatisfactory.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Emergency. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). O2 purity & battery voltage satisfactory. Cycle pressure unsatisfactory.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Emergency. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). Battery test load alarm pass. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Medical Ward. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). O2 purity unsatisfactory on analyzer. Battery alarm & power failure alarm, battery voltage satisfactory.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Medical Ward. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). O2 purity, battery alarm, power failure alarm, battery voltage satisfactory. Cycle pressure readings unsatisfactory.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Medical Ward. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Oxygen analyzer (Maxtec AF17199058); Digital pressure meter (DMG-2G SN:3130002). 5 of 8 units satisfactory for all parameters; 2 units unsatisfactory for O2 purity & cycle pressure on analyzer; 1 unit unsatisfactory for O2 purity & cycle pressure.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: ICU. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Gas flow analyzer (FLUKE SN:4179049). O2 alarm, air failure alarm pass. Breathing circuit leak — N/A (anesthesia unit). O2 calibration pass. Tidal volume, breath rate, O2 concentration pass. Pressure readings unsatisfactory; parameters measured 11 times — average unacceptable per ISO 80601-2-12-2011(E).

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: ICU. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Gas flow analyzer (FLUKE SN:4179049). Similar results to above. FIO2, tidal volume, breath rate satisfactory. Pressure, frequency readings unsatisfactory.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: ICU. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Gas flow analyzer (FLUKE SN:4179049). All parameters satisfactory per ISO 80601-2-12-2011(E).

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Operation Room. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Gas flow analyzer (FLUKE SN:4179049). O2 alarm, air failure alarm pass. O2 calibration N/A (anesthesia unit). Tidal volume 360ml (limit 270–330) — FAIL. PEEP pass.

Imported from Menelik II Hospital performance verification record. Maintenance site: Operation Room. Work order type: Preventive Maintenance. Test equipment: Gas flow analyzer (FLUKE SN:4179049). O2 alarm pass; air failure alarm pass. Breathing circuit leak test pass. O2 calibration N/A. Tidal volume, breath rate, O2 concentration generally satisfactory. Some pressure deviations noted.
